Document merge/insert rules: Import the SkiaSharp namespace and ensure the SkiaSharp NuGet package is referenced.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Keep other image‑insertion code unchanged; Aspose.Words overloads accept file paths for inline/floating images.
Watermark rules: When adding an image watermark use a SkiaSharp.SKBitmap instance, not a file path string.
Dispose the SKBitmap (e.g., with a using statement) after setting the watermark to avoid memory leaks.
